blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 36 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,877 ft. Looking ahead, 47 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
